works.lesson: Copper on warm amber = editorial warmth without red aggression. Differentiated from griflan red. Warm temperature intentional throughout.
Cool violet canvas = creative depth. Vermillion accent avoids copper (Forge) and purple (AI). Dual-theme palette with dark/light rhythm. 5.2:1 contrast on accent.

failures.reason: Purple gradient = #1 AI fingerprint. Never use.
